reviews.review_msg: Briggs is a really nice guy and loves what he does, but he can not communicate the information very well, and often makes leaps and bounds of logic and simply assume that we're all following what he's talking about. It's his first term teaching and he has a lot to learn. I would NOT recommend him. Take the class with someone else if you can.

Eric is a super caring and easygoing prof. He genuinely wants his students to succeed and will take time to go over topics and reaffirm your understanding. His attitude and mindset were especially helpful for ARCH376, as it's an upper-level Quant course, and I struggled with stats. Bonus points, He looks like an academic Matt Damon
